overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through overcast prairie grasslands. The character encounters a horse rider passing by and continues toward a large solitary tree on a hill.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass, passing large rocks on the right

entered.detail: cluster of large gray boulders beside the trail
dense line of oak trees forming the forest edge
narrow dirt path winding through tall grass
tall green grass covering the open field

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through an open prairie under an overcast sky. Large rock formations sit to the right of the path while a line of oak trees borders the left side in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with horse path crossing

events.description: rider on horseback approaches from the right and passes by the ego character on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse rider approaches and passes by on the right side

notable_agents.action: riding a black horse along the path, passing by from right to left

entered.detail: massive single oak tree standing on a small hill in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the open grassland, a rider on horseback approaches from the right and passes by. A large solitary tree becomes visible ahead on a small hill, while the rock formations disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside approach to landmark tree

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward the large solitary tree at the crest of the grassy hill

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the gentle grassy slope toward the prominent solitary tree. The trail leads directly to the base of the large tree as it grows larger in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a prairie trail that leads from an open grassland toward a solitary tree atop a hill. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt path under an overcast sky, flanked by distant oak trees and large rock formations to the right. As the character progresses through the open terrain, a rider on horseback approaches from the right and passes by, while the rock formations recede from view. The scene then shifts focus toward a prominent solitary tree appearing ahead on a small rise. Finally, the camera follows the character as they ascend the gentle grassy slope, with the trail leading directly to the base of the large tree as it fills the frame.
